case_title: LIU, ANNA et al VS KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,600.00 FILED BY LIU, ANNA LIU, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-29-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-17-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF ANNA LIU ILL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, ANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC. $4,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,627.00, ROGER LIU IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAILING TO KAISER PLAN, INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
